top_signals.title: Stocks Fall Before Alphabet’s Results as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street investors bracing for the start of the high-stakes megacap earnings season sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as worries about an escalation in the Iran war boosted oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Houthis deploy missiles and drones to attack ships in southern Red Sea, naval group says
top_signals.summary: Attacks on ships transiting the Bab el-Mandeb threaten to cut off millions of barrels per day of Saudi crude oil exports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to romance and investment scams
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The West Country: the UK’s most dysfunctional property market
top_signals.summary: Unsold homes are piling up as locals can’t afford to buy properties at a price that homeowners are willing to sell for

top_signals.title: AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic as part of computing power deal
top_signals.summary: Anthropic's agreement with AMD is the latest in a string of infrastructure deals the company has announced this year to increase its computing capacity.
